name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for control-plane release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group. Control-plane owns provisioning for this group.

name: AZURE_LOCATION
notes: Azure region used by shared runtime provisioning.

name: ACR_NAME
notes: Shared Azure Container Registry name.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by Container Apps to pull from ACR.

name: API_RUNTIME_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by the API runtime for Azure SDK and data-plane access.

name: JOB_CONTROL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity reserved for narrow Container Apps and job control operations.

name: ENABLE_ACR_PRIVATE_LINK
notes: Provision ACR Premium private endpoint and privatelink.azurecr.io private DNS support during infra reconcile.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_NAME
notes: Shared Container Apps environment name.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_VNET_NAME
notes: Parallel workload-profiles Container Apps environment name for the VNet-backed private runtime.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: LOG_ANALYTICS_WORKSPACE_NAME
notes: Shared Log Analytics workspace name.

name: ACA_VNET_NAME
notes: Standalone VNet name that hosts the parallel Container Apps private runtime.

name: ACA_VNET_ADDRESS_SPACE
notes: Address space for the standalone VNet that hosts the parallel Container Apps private runtime.

name: ACA_INFRA_SUBNET_NAME
notes: Subnet name delegated to Microsoft.App/environments for the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: ACA_INFRA_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: CIDR prefix for the delegated Container Apps infrastructure subnet.

name: PRIVATE_ENDPOINT_SUBNET_NAME
notes: Subnet name reserved for storage and Postgres private endpoints.

name: PRIVATE_ENDPOINT_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: CIDR prefix for the private endpoint subnet.

name: ACA_RESERVED_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: Reserved CIDR range kept unallocated for later network growth inside the standalone runtime VNet.

name: NAT_GATEWAY_NAME
notes: NAT Gateway name used to pin the VNet-backed Container Apps environment to explicit egress.

name: NAT_PUBLIC_IP_NAME
notes: Static public IP resource name attached to the NAT Gateway for the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: ACA_NETWORK_SMOKE_JOB_NAME
notes: Manual Container Apps Job name used to validate internal API reachability plus private DNS and data-plane connectivity from inside the VNet.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Primary storage account for runtime data.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_COMMON
notes: Canonical common container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_BRONZE
notes: Canonical bronze container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_SILVER
notes: Canonical silver container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_GOLD
notes: Canonical gold container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_PLATINUM
notes: Canonical platinum container name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_MARKET
notes: Canonical market folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_FINANCE
notes: Canonical finance folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_EARNINGS
notes: Canonical earnings folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_TARGETS
notes: Canonical price-target folder name.

name: API_APP_NAME
notes: Control-plane Container App name.

name: API_DEPLOY_MANIFEST
notes: Manifest path used by deploy-prod.yml. Default is deploy/app_api.yaml for internal-only API; deploy/app_api_public.yaml is break-glass only.

name: ALLOW_PUBLIC_API_INGRESS
notes: Break-glass guard that must be true before deploy-prod.yml accepts deploy/app_api_public.yaml.

name: API_ROOT_PREFIX
notes: Optional API root prefix.

name: API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
notes: Absolute public API origin used to derive provider OAuth callback URLs when provider-specific callback overrides are unset.

name: API_CSP
notes: Control-plane CSP header.

name: API_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
notes: Allowed browser origins for the API.

name: API_OIDC_ISSUER
notes: OIDC issuer url for API auth.

name: API_OIDC_AUDIENCE
notes: OIDC audience or API app id for the API.

name: API_OIDC_JWKS_URL
notes: Explicit JWKS url when discovery is not enough.

name: API_OIDC_REQUIRED_SCOPES
notes: Optional required scopes for API access.

name: API_OIDC_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional required roles for API access.

name: API_AUTH_SESSION_MODE
notes: Auth session transport mode. Standard browser deployments use cookie.

name: API_AUTH_SESSION_IDLE_TTL_SECONDS
notes: Sliding idle lifetime in seconds for API auth session cookies. Standard browser default is 1800.

name: API_AUTH_SESSION_ABSOLUTE_TTL_SECONDS
notes: Absolute maximum lifetime in seconds for API auth session cookies. Standard browser default is 28800.

name: API_AUTH_SESSION_SECRET_KEYS
notes: Comma-separated auth session signing/encryption secrets; first key signs new cookies and later keys support rotation.

name: UI_BREAK_GLASS_PASSWORD_AUTH_ENABLED
notes: Explicit break-glass flag for the shared-password flow. Leave false in standard deployments.

name: UI_SHARED_PASSWORD_HASH
notes: Password verifier used only for explicit break-glass password auth. Generate a pbkdf2_sha256 or scrypt hash instead of storing the plaintext password.

name: UI_BREAK_GLASS_PASSWORD_ROLES
notes: Comma-separated roles granted to the explicit break-glass password session.

name: UI_BREAK_GLASS_PASSWORD_ALLOWED_CIDRS
notes: Comma-separated CIDR allowlist enforced before break-glass password auth is accepted.

name: UI_BREAK_GLASS_PASSWORD_EXPIRES_AT
notes: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp after which break-glass password auth is rejected.

name: DATA_DISCOVERY_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for data discovery catalog and raw Postgres read access.

name: DATA_DISCOVERY_WRITE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for raw Postgres update and purge access.

name: DATA_DISCOVERY_VISIBLE_SCHEMAS
notes: Comma-separated schema allowlist exposed by the data discovery surface and raw Postgres explorer.

name: DATA_DISCOVERY_SAMPLE_MAX_LIMIT
notes: Maximum row count accepted by the discovery sample preview endpoint.

name: DATA_DISCOVERY_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS
notes: In-process TTL in seconds for cached discovery catalog and dataset detail responses.

name: SYSTEM_READ_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required for elevated system read endpoints when configured.

name: SYSTEM_LOGS_READ_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required for job and Container App log retrieval endpoints.

name: SYSTEM_OPERATE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required to start and stop Container Apps.

name: RUNTIME_CONFIG_WRITE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required to modify runtime config and debug-symbol state.

name: JOB_OPERATE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required to run suspend stop or resume Container Apps jobs.

name: PURGE_WRITE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Roles required for purge rule mutation and purge execution endpoints.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_READ_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for notification read access.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_WRITE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for notification write access.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_DELIVERY_PROVIDER
notes: Notification delivery provider. Use log by default and acs for Azure Communication Services delivery.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_APP_BASE_URL
notes: Absolute app origin used to build notification action links.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_ACTION_PATH_TEMPLATE
notes: Path template used to build notification action links and must include the token placeholder.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_DEFAULT_TRADE_APPROVAL_TTL_SECONDS
notes: Default notification trade approval token lifetime in seconds.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_ACS_EMAIL_SENDER
notes: Azure Communication Services email sender address for notifications.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_ACS_SMS_FROM
notes: Azure Communication Services SMS sender number for notifications.

name: AI_RELAY_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the control-plane AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MODEL
notes: Deploy-time fixed OpenAI model used by the AI relay.

name: AI_RELAY_REASONING_EFFORT
notes: Reasoning effort passed to reasoning-capable OpenAI models.

name: AI_RELAY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for upstream AI relay requests.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_PROMPT_CHARS
notes: Maximum prompt size accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_FILES
notes: Maximum number of files accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_FILE_BYTES
notes: Maximum bytes accepted for a single AI relay upload.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_TOTAL_FILE_BYTES
notes: Maximum combined upload bytes accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
notes: Maximum completion token budget passed to the AI relay model.

name: AI_RELAY_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required to use the AI relay endpoint.

name: QUIVER_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the repo-local Quiver integration routes.

name: QUIVER_BASE_URL
notes: Quiver API base url.

name: QUIVER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for outbound Quiver API requests.

name: QUIVER_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN
notes: Per-process Quiver request budget used by the control-plane client.

name: QUIVER_MAX_CONCURRENCY
notes: Maximum concurrent outbound Quiver requests issued by the shared client.

name: QUIVER_MAX_RETRIES
notes: Maximum retry attempts for retryable Quiver GET requests.

name: QUIVER_BACKOFF_BASE_SECONDS
notes: Base backoff in seconds between retryable Quiver GET requests.

name: QUIVER_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for Quiver read access.

name: ETRADE_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the repo-local E*TRADE integration routes.

name: ETRADE_TRADING_ENABLED
notes: Separately enable or disable E*TRADE preview

name: ETRADE_CALLBACK_URL
notes: Optional explicit E*TRADE callback URL override. When unset
column7: the API derives the callback from API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL plus the canonical E*TRADE callback path.

name: ETRADE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for outbound E*TRADE API and OAuth requests.

name: ETRADE_READ_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
notes: Maximum read retry attempts for retryable E*TRADE read failures.

name: ETRADE_READ_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_SECONDS
notes: Base backoff in seconds between E*TRADE read retries.

name: ETRADE_PENDING_AUTH_TTL_SECONDS
notes: Maximum lifetime in seconds for a pending E*TRADE request-token flow.

name: ETRADE_PREVIEW_TTL_SECONDS
notes: Maximum lifetime in seconds for a cached E*TRADE preview ID before place.

name: ETRADE_IDLE_RENEW_SECONDS
notes: Idle threshold in seconds before E*TRADE read calls renew an inactive access token.

name: ETRADE_SESSION_EXPIRY_GUARD_SECONDS
notes: Safety guard window in seconds before Eastern-midnight token expiry where preview or trade requests are blocked.

name: ETRADE_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional route-specific roles required for E*TRADE read access.

name: ETRADE_TRADING_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for E*TRADE preview

name: SCHWAB_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the repo-local Schwab integration routes.

name: SCHWAB_TRADING_ENABLED
notes: Separately enable or disable Schwab preview

name: SCHWAB_APP_CALLBACK_URL
notes: Optional explicit Schwab callback URL override. When unset
column7: the API derives the callback from API_PUBLIC_BASE_URL plus the canonical Schwab callback path.

name: SCHWAB_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for outbound Schwab OAuth and Trader API requests.

name: SCHWAB_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional route-specific roles required for Schwab read access.

name: SCHWAB_TRADING_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for Schwab preview

name: ALPACA_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for outbound Alpaca Trading API requests.

name: ALPACA_MAX_RETRIES
notes: Maximum retry attempts for retryable Alpaca GET requests.

name: ALPACA_BACKOFF_BASE_SECONDS
notes: Base backoff in seconds between retryable Alpaca GET requests.

name: ALPACA_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional route-specific roles required for Alpaca read access.

name: ALPACA_TRADING_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for Alpaca submit

name: ALPACA_PAPER_TRADING_BASE_URL
notes: Optional paper Alpaca Trading API base URL override.

name: ALPACA_LIVE_TRADING_BASE_URL
notes: Optional live Alpaca Trading API base URL override.

name: KALSHI_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the repo-local Kalshi integration routes.

name: KALSHI_TRADING_ENABLED
notes: Separately enable or disable Kalshi create amend and cancel operations.

name: KALSHI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for outbound Kalshi API requests.

name: KALSHI_READ_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
notes: Maximum retry attempts for retryable Kalshi read requests.

name: KALSHI_READ_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_SECONDS
notes: Base backoff in seconds between retryable Kalshi read requests.

name: KALSHI_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional route-specific roles required for Kalshi read access.

name: KALSHI_TRADING_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required for Kalshi create amend and cancel access.

name: KALSHI_LIVE_BASE_URL
notes: Optional Kalshi live API base URL override.

name: SYMBOL_ENRICHMENT_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the symbol cleanup and AI enrichment workflow.

name: SYMBOL_ENRICHMENT_MODEL
notes: Deploy-time fixed OpenAI model used by symbol enrichment resolve.

name: SYMBOL_ENRICHMENT_CONFIDENCE_MIN
notes: Minimum AI confidence accepted by internal symbol enrichment resolve.

name: SYMBOL_ENRICHMENT_MAX_SYMBOLS_PER_RUN
notes: Upper bound for symbols enqueued in a single symbol enrichment run.

name: SYMBOL_ENRICHMENT_ALLOWED_JOBS
notes: Comma-separated caller-job allowlist permitted to claim and resolve symbol enrichment work.

name: UI_API_BASE_URL
notes: Public UI base url used by control-plane runtime config and auth.

name: UI_AUTH_PROVIDER
notes: UI auth provider surfaced by config.js and auth/session routes. Standard deployments use oidc; password is break-glass only.

name: UI_PUBLIC_HOSTNAME
notes: Stable public UI hostname used for Entra redirect registration and the external UI edge after custom-domain cutover.

name: UI_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
notes: UI Entra app client id.

name: UI_OIDC_AUTHORITY
notes: UI OIDC authority.

name: UI_OIDC_SCOPES
notes: UI delegated scopes.

name: UI_OIDC_REDIRECT_URI
notes: UI redirect uri for Entra auth.

name: UI_OIDC_POST_LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URI
notes: Optional explicit post-logout redirect uri for the UI Entra flow. When unset
column7: the control plane derives it from UI_OIDC_REDIRECT_URI.

name: API_APP_VNET_NAME
notes: Internal-only API Container App name deployed into the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: UI_APP_VNET_NAME
notes: External UI Container App name deployed into the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: JOBS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling jobs repo slug used for repository_dispatch.

name: DISPATCH_APP_ID
notes: GitHub App id used for cross-repo dispatch.

name: LOG_LEVEL
notes: Release and deploy log level.

name: MASSIVE_BASE_URL
notes: Massive API base url.

name: MASSIVE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Massive provider timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN
notes: Alpha Vantage rate limit used by deployment and compatibility flows.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_RATE_WAIT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage wait timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Alpha Vantage worker concurrency.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_POLL_SECONDS
notes: Realtime log poll interval.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_LOOKBACK_SECONDS
notes: Realtime log initial lookback.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_BATCH_SIZE
notes: Realtime log batch size.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_ARM_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: System health ARM timeout.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_FRESHNESS_OVERRIDES_JSON
notes: System health freshness override json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_JOB_EXECUTIONS_PER_JOB
notes: System health executions per job.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_QUERIES_JSON
notes: System health KQL query json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: System health Log Analytics timeout.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_TIMESPAN_MINUTES
notes: System health Log Analytics timespan.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_WORKSPACE_ID
notes: System health workspace id.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MARKERS_CONTAINER
notes: System health marker container name.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MARKERS_PREFIX
notes: System health marker prefix.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_AGGREGATION
notes: Metrics aggregation.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_API_VERSION
notes: Metrics api version.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_CONTAINERAPP_METRICS
notes: Container App metrics list.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_INTERVAL
notes: Metrics interval.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_JOB_METRICS
notes: Job metrics list.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_THRESHOLDS_JSON
notes: Metrics thresholds json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_TIMESPAN_MINUTES
notes: Metrics timespan.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_RESOURCE_HEALTH_API_VERSION
notes: Resource health api version.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_VERBOSE_IDS
notes: Whether to emit verbose Azure resource ids.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY
notes: Alpha Vantage API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: AI_RELAY_API_KEY
notes: OpenAI API key used by the control-plane AI relay. Never auto-discovered.

name: AI_RELAY_SMOKE_BEARER_TOKEN
notes: Optional bearer token used by deploy smoke to verify an authorized AI relay stream.

name: AI_RELAY_SMOKE_FORBIDDEN_BEARER_TOKEN
notes: Optional bearer token used by deploy smoke to verify AI relay role-denied behavior.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_TOKEN_HASH_SECRET
notes: Secret used to hash notification action tokens.

name: NOTIFICATIONS_ACS_CONNECTION_STRING
notes: Azure Communication Services connection string for notification delivery.

name: QUIVER_API_KEY
notes: Quiver API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: ETRADE_SANDBOX_CONSUMER_KEY
notes: E*TRADE sandbox consumer key for OAuth 1.0a login and sandbox API calls.

name: ETRADE_SANDBOX_CONSUMER_SECRET
notes: E*TRADE sandbox consumer secret for OAuth 1.0a login and sandbox API calls.

name: ETRADE_LIVE_CONSUMER_KEY
notes: E*TRADE live consumer key for OAuth 1.0a login and live API calls.

name: ETRADE_LIVE_CONSUMER_SECRET
notes: E*TRADE live consumer secret for OAuth 1.0a login and live API calls.

name: ALPACA_PAPER_API_KEY_ID
notes: Alpaca paper Trading API key id for simulated trading requests.

name: ALPACA_PAPER_SECRET_KEY
notes: Alpaca paper Trading API secret key for simulated trading requests.

name: ALPACA_LIVE_API_KEY_ID
notes: Alpaca live Trading API key id for live brokerage requests.

name: ALPACA_LIVE_SECRET_KEY
notes: Alpaca live Trading API secret key for live brokerage requests.

name: KALSHI_LIVE_API_KEY_ID
notes: Kalshi live API key id for signed requests against the production exchange environment.

name: KALSHI_LIVE_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM
notes: Kalshi live RSA private key in PEM format for signing production requests.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
notes: Storage connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the storage connection string Container App secret.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Alpha Vantage API key Container App secret.

name: MASSIVE_API_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Massive API key Container App secret.

name: POSTGRES_DSN_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Postgres DSN Container App secret.

name: ALPACA_PAPER_API_KEY_ID_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Alpaca paper API key id Container App secret.

name: ALPACA_PAPER_SECRET_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Alpaca paper secret key Container App secret.

name: ALPACA_LIVE_API_KEY_ID_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Alpaca live API key id Container App secret.

name: ALPACA_LIVE_SECRET_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Alpaca live secret key Container App secret.

name: ETRADE_SANDBOX_CONSUMER_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the E*TRADE sandbox consumer key Container App secret.

name: ETRADE_SANDBOX_CONSUMER_SECRET_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the E*TRADE sandbox consumer secret Container App secret.

name: ETRADE_LIVE_CONSUMER_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the E*TRADE live consumer key Container App secret.

name: ETRADE_LIVE_CONSUMER_SECRET_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the E*TRADE live consumer secret Container App secret.

name: SCHWAB_CLIENT_ID_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Schwab client id Container App secret.

name: SCHWAB_CLIENT_SECRET_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the Schwab client secret Container App secret.

name: AI_RELAY_API_KEY_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for the AI relay API key Container App secret.

name: API_AUTH_SESSION_SECRET_KEYS_KEY_VAULT_URL
notes: Optional Key Vault secret URL for API auth session secret keys.

name: DISPATCH_APP_PRIVATE_KEY
notes: GitHub App private key with literal newline escapes or base64 encoding.

name: RUN_LIVE_MASSIVE_TESTS
notes: Optional local opt-in for live Massive integration tests. Keep false unless intentionally exercising live Massive APIs.

name: RUN_LIVE_QUIVER_TESTS
notes: Optional local opt-in for live Quiver integration tests. Keep false unless intentionally exercising live Quiver APIs.

name: MASSIVE_API_KEY
notes: Massive API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: SCHWAB_CLIENT_ID
notes: Schwab Trader API client id for the approved Schwab developer application.

name: SCHWAB_CLIENT_SECRET
notes: Schwab Trader API client secret for the approved Schwab developer application.

name: POSTGRES_SERVER_NAME
notes: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server name used during provisioning and DSN generation.

name: POSTGRES_DATABASE_NAME
notes: Control-plane Postgres database name used during provisioning and DSN generation.

name: POSTGRES_ADMIN_USER
notes: Azure Postgres administrator username used during provisioning and DSN regeneration.

name: POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD
notes: Azure Postgres administrator password used during provisioning and DSN regeneration.

name: POSTGRES_DSN
notes: Control-plane Postgres connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional primary Python package index used by CI and release workflows when private package publication is enabled.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_EXTRA_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional extra Python package index used by CI and release workflows when private package publication is enabled.
